title: BC Trails & Tales
description: Modpack made for the BC Trails & Tales Server.
body:
This modpack contains mods that will enhance the Vanilla experience and add adventure to your world.

 

You will find quality-of-life mods, visual changes, added ambiance, and more, breathing life into your worlds and builds. These mods have also been made to work with fabric servers and made for the Bc Trails and Tales server, but you can always use it with your friends!

 

Also, please support the creators of all of these mods and added content! They make great stuff. Go check them out!
